c_signature: static void mpfr_mpz_set_uj (mpz_t z, uintmax_t n)
doc:
Pure-TS port of MPFR's static helper mpfr_mpz_set_uj (mpfr/src/pow_uj.c L40-L57). In C, this sets an mpz_t z to the uintmax_t value n, handling the case where uintmax_t exceeds unsigned long by decomposing n into (high << ULONG_BITS) | low and reassembling via mpz_set_ui + mpz_mul_2exp + mpz_add_ui.

Under ADR 0003 (bigint-as-mpz_t), this entire two-limb-style decomposition is unnecessary: TS bigint is arbitrary-precision natively, and the operation reduces to the identity n -> n (for the uint64 domain that uintmax_t inhabits on platforms we care about). The TS port validates the uint64 domain and returns n unchanged.

C function is declared static -- it has no public symbol. The only C caller is mpfr_pow_uj (in the same compilation unit), which composes it with pow_ui.c via #include preprocessor inclusion. The TS surface preserves the helper because (a) the orchestrator's callgraph picks it up via the standalone-wire-form-with-delegate pattern (decision_delegation_pattern.md), (b) the underlying primitive -- 'lift a uintmax_t to an mpz_t' -- is well-defined and reusable, and (c) future mpfr_pow_uj port can call it directly to mirror the C structure verbatim.

Tag minimums per Rule 7: happy 20, edge 30, adversarial 12, fuzz 50, mined 5.
divergence_from_c:
Three divergences:

  1. Return: C void (mutates z) -> TS returns bigint (the assigned value).

  2. Parameter shape: C (mpz_t z, uintmax_t n) -> TS (n: bigint). The output z is gone -- replaced by the return value -- and n is now a bigint constrained to the uint64 domain.

  3. Decomposition: C has to manually split n into high/low halves via mpz_set_ui + mpz_mul_2exp + mpz_add_ui because mpz_set_ui only takes unsigned long. TS bigint has no such limitation: the value flows through unchanged.

No invariants beyond 'returns n unchanged when 0n <= n <= UINT64_MAX'. Throws MPFRError('EDOMAIN') on negative n or n > UINT64_MAX.
refs: mpfr/src/pow_uj.c L40-L57 -- the static C helper body.
mpfr/src/set_uj.c -- the broader uintmax_t-to-mpfr family (related but distinct path).
memory/decision_delegation_pattern.md -- standalone-wire-form-with-delegate pattern for static helpers.
src/ops/set_uj_2exp.ts -- reference for uintmax_t domain validation (UINT64_MAX constant).
